description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to test on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, pypy-3.9, pypy-3.10). For each job, check out the code, set up the specified Python version, install tox and wheel, run tests with tox, and optionally install Scipy prerequisites and run tests with Scipy.
